name: Carta
description: Carta is an equity management and cap table platform used by VC-backed startups for managing equity, valuations, and stakeholder records.

config.setupInstructions:
To connect Carta:
1. You need a Carta developer portal invite or API access from Carta
2. Create an OAuth app in the Carta developer portal at https://developers.app.carta.com
3. Set the grant type to Authorization Code
4. Add the CompAI callback URL to your allowed redirect URIs
5. Select scopes: read_issuer_info and read_issuer_stakeholders
6. Copy your Client ID and Client Secret into CompAI
7. Click Connect to authorize access

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Carta API connection is active and accessible by listing the issuers (companies) the authenticated user has access to.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists stakeholders (equity holders) across all issuers the authenticated user has access to, showing their roles and relationships for compliance review.
